title: Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies!
